title.en: Of course, the lone Tianhu Beast, he didn't nee...

content.en:
Airplanes!

Ye Tian turned on the Copying Talent, and no longer focused on perceiving the Life White Stone, but directly looked for the Heavenly Lake Beasts that gathered together.

Of course, the lone Tianhu Beast, he didn't need to care.

After all, the lone Tianhu Beast is not staying in its lair, and it is unlikely that there will be living white stones around.

After having a target, Ye Tian quickly found a group of Heavenly Lake Beasts.

After approaching this group of Heavenly Lake Beasts, Ye Tian really sensed some life white stones.

Immediately, Ye Tian immediately took action, snatched away these life white stones, and immediately fled.

......

Another place in the Tianhu Sea.

Ye Tian stopped.

"Sure enough, the Celestial Lake Beast likes to stay in the place where the White Stone of Life was born. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he continued to look for the place where the Heavenly Lake Beasts gathered, and as time passed, the White Stone of Life in every place was found by Ye Tian.

After a long time, Ye Tian found a large number of life white stones.

At this time, there may still be life white stones in Tianhu Sea, but there are definitely not many.

After all, this is just a place where the White Stone of Life was born.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian left immediately.

After that, Ye Tian didn't go looking for the Cursed Black Stone, because he had enough Life White Stone, and he could use the Life White Stone to trade the Cursed Black Stone with other Eternal Masters.

He believed that there were many eternal masters who cursed the Blackstone in his hands, and he was absolutely willing to trade the Life Whitestone with him.

Soon.

Ye Tian released the news that he had a lot of life white stones in his hands, and he was willing to trade and curse the black stones.

Then, he waited quietly for the other Eternal Masters to come to him.

Time passed, and it wasn't long before an eternal master arrived.

......

"I've seen the Endless Master!"

The one who came to see Ye Tian was the Nine Realms-level controller Xuan Qing, and his strength was not bad among the Nine Realm-level controllers.

"Infinite Master, I'm here to trade you for some Life Stones!" the Xuanqing Master began.

"Yes, how about exchanging a life white stone for a hundred cursed black stones?"

Ye Tian said.

Life Whitestone is even rarer, and the Cursed Blackstone is still quite numerous in the Sea of Boundary, so this trade ratio is absolutely reasonable.

"Yes!"

The Xuanqing Controller nodded.

Subsequently, the two completed the transaction.

But the Xuanqing Controller didn't trade many Life White Stones, only twenty.

But not long after the Xuanqing controller left, another Nine Realms-level controller came to Ye Tian to trade.

In this way, one by one the eternal masters came to trade, which made the number of cursed black stones in Ye Tian's hands more and more numerous.

This kind of day when he didn't need to go to the end of the realm to slowly look for the cursed black stone was too comfortable, so that Ye Tian no longer lacked the cursed black stone.

Finally, after a period of time, there are no eternal masters to trade with Ye Tian, after all, many eternal masters don't even have cursed black stones, how many cursed black stones are there to trade life white stones!

And no one came to him, so Ye Tian also announced his retreat, and began to practice by himself, taking the path of breaking the shackles of the primordial-level control body.

After all, every time he breaks a chain, he can improve his strength a lot, and he naturally has to go.

Moreover, he felt that this path was even more reliable than absorbing the Origin Realm Sea Origin.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he took out some Life White Stones and a large amount of Cursed Black Stones, and absorbed the power of the two stones and poured them into his primordial-level mastery body, stimulating the root of the primordial-level mastery body.

Airplanes!!!!

In the darkness, Ye Tian sensed the shackles and chains at the root of the primordial-level control body.

Ye Tian tried to break a chain, but found it difficult to tear the chain.

He struck again and again, still failing, and the Life White Stone and the Cursed Black Stone were still rapidly depleting.

However, Ye Tian still found that this shackle chain was loosening, which meant that there was hope for the impact.

"The Master said that the first Eternal Master who discovered this path was easy to break these chains, but after that it was very difficult. It is equivalent to that this was a loophole at the beginning, but now this loophole has been filled by the rules of the Origin Realm Sea, and if the latecomers want to continue to break the shackles, the difficulty has increased many times!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, even if it is more difficult, this is still a bright avenue, and it is the third path that truly belongs to those who control above the Eighth Realm to improve their strength.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian continued to impact this shackle chain.

A long time had passed, and after consuming a lot of cursed black stones and life white stones, Ye Tian had finally broken the first shackle chain.

Click!

The first shackles were broken.

Then, this shackle chain turned into a stream of golden energy that poured into Ye Tian's primordial-level control body, making Ye Tian's primordial-level control body continue to improve, and the improvement was still very large.

At the same time, Ye Tian's strength is also skyrocketing!

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to attack the second shackle chain, but it was more difficult.

Fortunately, Ye Tian had enough curse black stones and enough life white stones this time, otherwise he would not have been sure to impact the second shackle chain.

Time flies.

I don't know how long it has been, but finally on this day after hundreds of thousands of realms of river years, Ye Tian finally broke the second shackle chain, and his primordial-level control body was once again elevated.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian's strength had improved a lot, and he had almost reached the extreme of a Nine Realm-level master.

In fact, Ye Tian was now qualified to open up the Boundary River and attack the Ten Realm-level controllers, but he didn't do so.

He wanted to break the shackles and chains to impact the Ten Realms-level controllers in this way, and after he reached the Ten Realms to control them, there was no problem in opening up the Boundary River.

Moreover, with the strength of the Ten Realm-level controllers to open up the Boundary River, they can be opened up 100% without even any auxiliary treasures.

Of course, Ye Tian calculated that if he wanted to be promoted to the Ten Realms level controller by breaking the shackles and chains, he needed to break at least nine shackles and chains.

He's only broken two chains so far, so he still needs to work hard.

Another million years of the Realm River passed, and after Ye Tian's efforts again, after consuming many cursed black stones and life white stones, Ye Tian finally broke the third shackle chain again.

But at this time, his curse Blackstone was not enough!
